mutations.description: Parse a malformed request before checking its signature.
Accept a request without verifying its HMAC.
Use ordinary buffer equality for signature verification.
Only verify with the first configured signing secret.
Bind the event ID to reserialized JSON instead of exact bytes.
Treat an existing event ID as a newly claimed delivery.
mutations.find:
ON CONFLICT (webhook_id) DO NOTHING
         RETURNING webhook_id
mutations.replace:
ON CONFLICT (webhook_id) DO UPDATE
           SET authenticated_sha256 = EXCLUDED.authenticated_sha256
         RETURNING webhook_id

mutations.description: Do not reject a webhook ID reused for different authenticated bytes.
Commit an accepted event without inserting its outbox action.
Commit the event before an outbox failure can roll it back.
Return 200 rather than the declared accepted response status.
